title: Department Manager Vacancy at Max Fashion Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Max Fashion Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Max Fashion Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Department Manager at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Max Fashion Holdings Services:
Max Fashion Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Fashion Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
